description: v3 collapses the old 15 sub-dimensions into 5 broader axes while keeping the same model ids (B/L/F/A/S). The legacy questionCount fields stay around as migration-era placeholders; v3 scoring only uses the top-level five axes.

dimensions.name: IQ
dimensions.description: How much you care about logic, detail, and data

dimensions.name: Loyalty
dimensions.description: How much misery your team can put you through before you bail

dimensions.name: Heat
dimensions.description: How quickly a bad game turns into words

dimensions.name: Action
dimensions.description: Whether you spend, show up, or actually get on a court

dimensions.name: Broadcast
dimensions.description: How badly you want other people to know you are watching
